method-shape=A:1:2|#method|2|false|true|X:3:4
brand-split=true|false|true|false|C:42|#staticMethod
brand-errors=false|TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:not an object|TypeError:'#method' is read-only|TypeError:invalid 'in' operand
reevaluation=false|true|false|false|true
super=42|42
derived=40|42|true|true
nonextensible-own-reflection=false|tag|0|true|false|locked
capture=40|41|42|42|true
forward-order=false|TypeError:not an object|TypeError:expecting <brand> private field|TypeError:expecting <brand> private field
uninitialized-private-in=true|true
initializer-order=42|42
duplicate-brand=TypeError:private method is already present
abrupt-reentry=true:41:true:42|true:41:true:42|true:41:true:42
r3i-class-private-methods-oracle=ok
